papers.authors: Shilei Li, Dawei Shi, Wei Zheng, Ling Shi
papers.evidence: 用于数据同化的分层变分卡尔曼滤波
papers.tldr: 传统变分卡尔曼滤波在噪声统计未知时，过程协方差估计不一致且收敛慢。本文引入无噪声状态代理变量显式建模过程噪声统计，并将坐标上升变分推断重写为边缘化最大后验问题，随后进行单步超参数拟合。该重构消除了CAVI的内迭代，解耦了协方差跟踪滤波器设计，使得可采用高阶滤波器与滑动窗口估计；当窗口覆盖全部历史时，协方差跟踪估计器本质上为零相位滤波器。数值模拟验证了该框架收敛更快且估计精度优于现有方法。
papers.abstract_en: Traditional variational Kalman filtering with unknown noise statistics suffers from inconsistent process covariance estimation and slow convergence speed, limiting its practical utility. To address these issues, we introduce a surrogate variable representing the process-noise-free state, which enables explicit modeling and inference of process noise statistics. In addition, we reformulate the conventional coordinate ascent variation inference (CAVI) as a marginalized maximum a posteriori problem, followed by a single-step hyperparameter fitting. This reformulation obviates the need for multiple inner iterations inherent to CAVI and decouples the design of the covariance tracking filters. Consequently, this architecture permits the deployment of higher-order filters for covariance tracking and enables sliding-window hyperparameter estimation. Notably, when this window encompasses all historical data, the covariance tracking estimator intrinsically operates as a zero-phase filter. Numerical simulations validate the theoretical framework, demonstrating the enhanced convergence speed and superior estimation accuracy compared with existing methods.
